---
lang: fr
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    lof: false
    lot: false
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    include-in-header: header.tex
    linkcolor: black
---


\maketitle
\thispagestyle{empty}
\newpage

\setcounter{page}{1}

\renewcommand{\contentsname}{Sommaire}

\tableofcontents


\newpage
# Introduction {.unnumbered}

\newpage
# Cahiers des charges



```{r}

```
